payload.label: coffee maker

payload.long_description: Glossy dark blue to black plastic compact coffee maker with a rounded top and curved front, small tabletop appliance appearance, slight surface reflections; mostly visible but slightly cut off at the left edge; photographed close-up (≈0.5 m).
